user.title: Setup TRMNL Webhook Push
user.description: Provide your TRMNL plugin webhook URL. Afterwards you can tag your Home Assistant entities to send. [How to tag your entities can be found Here]({docs_url}).

data_description.webhook_url: The webhook URL. The URL can be found on the plugin settings page.
data_description.publish_interval: How frequently data is pushed. TRMNL screens refresh at max every 15 minutes.

error.invalid_url: The format entered is not a valid URL. Ensure it starts with http:// or https://.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the provided URL or server returned a bad code. Please verify the address and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while setting up the flow.
